items.headline: Bureau County motorcyclist killed in Illinois 29 crash identified
items.summary: The Bureau County Coroner has identified a 45-year-old Bureau County man who died in a motorcycle crash Sunday on Illinois 29 near Depue.

items.headline: Rock Island native pushes for memorial at site of first NFL game

items.headline: No charges filed against Illinois State Police trooper in fatal January shooting
items.summary: Prosecutors have cleared an Illinois State Police trooper in the fatal shooting of a woman during a January traffic stop in East St. Louis.

items.headline: Muscatine boat harbor, marina, open after dredging
items.summary: Dredging operations in the Muscatine Boat Harbor and Marina are wrapping up, and the harbor facilities are open and available for use, a news release says. The …

items.headline: Iowa State Fair invites service members to sing national anthem during daily ceremony
items.summary: Fair organizers are looking for veteran, law enforcement or military groups to perform the national anthem at 10 a.m. every day of the fair.

items.headline: 2026 Iowa State Fair full Grandstand lineup
items.summary: With artists representing country, indie pop, rock, rap, Christian and more, this year's Grandstand lineup has something for everyone.

items.headline: Des Moines-based Krause Group to acquire majority stake in historic Portuguese soccer club
items.summary: Krause Group's portfolio already includes the soccer clubs Parma Calcio 1913 in Italy and the Des Moines Menace in Iowa.

items.headline: Eldridge approves city absorption of volunteer fire department
items.summary: The Eldridge City Council decided to take over control of the fire department at a city council meeting Monday night. The fire department was all-volunteer unti…

items.headline: Eldridge to take on volunteer fire company as a City department
items.summary: Negotiations soured last month amid disputes over proposed budgets and trust in the City, but all parties came back to the table for the final decision.
